description: Query the codebase index (requires codebase indexing to be enabled). Supports two search modes: (1) target: glob file path pattern with ** support (e.g. '**/index.vue' finds all index.vue files; 'src/**/*.go' finds all Go files under src/). (2) content: search by summary/keyword (SQL LIKE). Either target or content must be provided (at least one). Both = AND combination. Returns: list of matching file paths, language, and indexed summary. Examples: {"target": "**/index.vue"}, {"content": "api handler"}, {"target": "src/**/*.ts", "content": "router"}.
name: query_codebase

query.description: Query type: overview, search, symbol, file, deps, usages. If omitted but target or content is provided, automatically runs file listing mode.

target.description: File path glob pattern, supports ** (globstar) for recursive matching. Examples: '**/index.vue', 'src/**/*.ts'.

content.description: Search keywords for file summary/content (SQL LIKE search on indexed summaries).

path.description: File path for 'file' or 'deps' query (relative to project root).

file.description: Specific file path for 'usages' query (narrow scope).
